requirements_collection_agent.name: Requirements Collection Agent
requirements_collection_agent.description: Collects job requirements from recruiters through multi-phase conversation

guardrails.description: Validates user input is 1-500 characters, no SQL injection patterns
Cannot skip phases: must progress 0→1→2→3→4→5 sequentially
Each user's session is isolated, cannot access other user data
All required phases must be complete before matching starts
Validate extracted fields match expected types and formats
On any error, provide user-friendly message and handle gracefully

resume_matching_tool.name: Resume Matching Tool
resume_matching_tool.description: Searches and matches resumes from ChromaDB based on requirements

guardrails.description: Always return max 2 resumes per query to prevent data overload
Only return matches with similarity score >= 0.65 (65%)
Results include computed fields only, sanitized for user view

user_profile_tool.name: User Profile Tool
user_profile_tool.description: Fetches user profile information from database

guardrails.description: Can only fetch own user data or authorized users
Sensitive fields masked in responses (passwords, tokens)
Verify embeddings are valid vectors before returning
